<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 7750; 3750; 7500; 20000; 35000; 65000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 4000; 1000; 2750; 9000; 20000; 42500
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 0; 1;
$FSE-PVP-DETECTION$ = 1; 2;
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Stronger Ammunition; Radar; Dual Turret; Even Heavier Ammo; XR-200 Turret
$FSE-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Radar; Stronger Ammunition; Dual Turret; Even Heavier Ammo; XR-200 Turret
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 149177741; 149177741; 3584258139; 3584280869; 3584258608
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Advanced
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.4 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 28 || 0.4 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 28 || 0.26 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 0.16 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 57 || 0.16 || 24 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 62 || 0.12 || 27 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.35 || 16.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.3 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 0.3 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.15 || 23 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 27 || 0.15 || 24.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 44 || 0.12 || 26.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
